Health Insurance Counseling and Advocacy Program (HICAP)
Meals on Wheels (via Older Americans Act / CA Dept. of Aging)
Multipurpose Senior Services Program (MSSP) Caregiver Support

verified.notes: No income or asset limits found; eligibility tied to Medi-Cal (which has its own tests) and nursing home level of care. No statewide application phone; contact local providers. Some variation in age (60+ or 65+ by site).

programs.programName: California Senior Legal Services (via Legal Services Inc. / Area Agencies)

verified.notes: SSP is a state supplement to federal SSI. Asset limits provided are for SSI (federal program); SSP-specific limits not found in search results. Income limits for SSI/SSP not provided in search results. Age requirement, income limits, and phone number could not be located in provided sources. Recommend consulting official California Department of Social Services or SSA websites directly.

verified.notes: CRC is a statewide network of 11 nonprofit centers serving family caregivers of adults with chronic/debilitating conditions and neurocognitive disorders. No eligibility criteria (age, income, assets limits) are specified in available official sources. Phone number provided is the Bay Area CRC toll-free line; other regional centers have different numbers. Program administration migrated to California Department of Aging as of July 2022. Services are provided at low or no cost but specific financial eligibility thresholds are not documented in retrieved sources.
